event: Transferred to the neonatal intensive care unit
Minimal enteral nutrition with breast milk started
Multiple areas of perforation in intestinal wall
On TPN until postoperative seventh day
Enteral nutrition insufficient due to short bowel syndrome
Enteral levothyroxine dose increased to 10 µg/kg/day
Still no increase in fT4 levels
Poor absorption of the drug due to resected duodenum, jejunum, and ileum
After nine days of rectal levothyroxine treatment fT4 levels increased
Cause of death was severe bronchopulmonary dysplasia
Cause of death was surgical NEC
Cause of death was short bowel syndrome
